project_type: Full-stack care home management app (CareVista) - React 18 frontend with Express/TypeScript backend
build_system: Vite for frontend, tsc for backend. npm as package manager.
test_framework: No test framework configured. Validation via build only.
build_command: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build && cd ../backend && npm install && npm run build
test_command: No tests configured - validate via successful build
verification_instructions: 1. Run frontend build: cd frontend && npm run build. 2. Run backend build: cd backend && npm run build. Both should complete without errors.
setup_instructions: cd frontend && npm install; cd backend && npm install
environment_constraints: Open internet - npm packages available. No database running (validation is compile-time only).
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md found. Follow existing code patterns.
key_patterns: Roles defined in: 1) DB enum in migrations/001_init.sql (user_role type), 2) frontend/src/types/index.ts (UserRole type), 3) frontend/src/utils/formatters.ts (ROLE_LABELS), 4) frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx (DEMO_ACCOUNTS array), 5) frontend/src/App.tsx (ROLE_COLORS + NAV_ALL roles arrays), 6) frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx (role router), 7) backend/src/utils/seed.ts (seed users). Dashboard pages live in frontend/src/pages/dashboards/ and follow patterns from ManagerDashboard, NurseDashboard, CarerDashboard, FinanceDashboard. Each dashboard imports hooks and renders role-specific KPIs/widgets.
directory_structure: frontend/src/pages/dashboards/ - role-specific dashboard components; frontend/src/pages/ - page-level components; frontend/src/hooks/ - React Query hooks; frontend/src/store/ - Zustand stores; frontend/src/utils/ - formatters and helpers; frontend/src/services/ - API client; backend/src/controllers/ - Express route handlers; backend/src/utils/ - seed, migration utilities
